mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE status = '0' ORDER BY order_num

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = '0' ORDER BY m.order_num
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
